NAME

mutex_stack_entry_t

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/debug/mutex.h>

Data Fields


uintptr_t mutex_key
const char * mutex_name
mutex_stack_state_t state
uint64_t timestamp_ns

Detailed Description

Entry in a thread's lock stack
